property.name: java.library.path
property.value: C:\Program Files\Java\jdk-22\bin;C:\WINDOWS\Sun\Java\bin;C:\WINDOWS\system32;C:\WINDOWS;C:\Users\exami\.codex\tmp\arg0\codex-arg0F5MdYb;C:\Users\exami\AppData\Local\Programs\Microsoft VS Code;C:\Program Files\Common Files\Oracle\Java\javapath;C:\WINDOWS\system32;C:\WINDOWS;C:\WINDOWS\System32\Wbem;C:\WINDOWS\System32\WindowsPowerShell\v1.0\;C:\WINDOWS\System32\OpenSSH\;C:\MinGW\bin;C:\Program Files\Git\cmd;C:\Program Files\nodejs\;C:\Program Files\MongoDB\Server\8.0\bin;;C:\Program Files\Docker\Docker\resources\bin;C:\Users\exami\AppData\Local\Programs\Python\Python312\Scripts\;C:\Users\exami\AppData\Local\Programs\Python\Python312\;C:\Users\exami\AppData\Local\Microsoft\WindowsApps;C:\MinGW\bin;C:\Users\exami\AppData\Local\Programs\Microsoft VS Code\bin;C:\Program Files\Java\jdk-22\bin;C:\Users\exami\AppData\Local\Microsoft\WinGet\Packages\Schniz.fnm_Microsoft.Winget.Source_8wekyb3d8bbwe;C:\Users\exami\AppData\Roaming\npm;C:\Users\exami\AppData\Local\GitHubDesktop\bin;C:\Program Files\JetBrains\IntelliJ IDEA 2026.1\bin;c:\Users\exami\.vscode\extensions\openai.chatgpt-26.5422.30944-win32-x64\bin\windows-x86_64;.

testcase.name: contextLoads
testcase.system-out:
00:45:17.920 [main] INFO org.springframework.test.context.support.AnnotationConfigContextLoaderUtils -- Could not detect default configuration classes for test class [com.Capstone.InterviewTracking.InterviewTrackingApplicationTests]: InterviewTrackingApplicationTests does not declare any static, non-private, non-final, nested classes annotated with @Configuration. 00:45:18.128 [main] INFO org.springframework.boot.test.context.SpringBootTestContextBootstrapper -- Found @SpringBootConfiguration com.Capstone.InterviewTracking.InterviewTrackingApplication for test class com.Capstone.InterviewTracking.InterviewTrackingApplicationTests 00:45:18.318 [main] INFO org.springframework.test.context.support.AnnotationConfigContextLoaderUtils -- Could not detect default configuration classes for test class [com.Capstone.InterviewTracking.InterviewTrackingApplicationTests]: InterviewTrackingApplicationTests does not declare any static, non-private, non-final, nested classes annotated with @Configuration. 00:45:18.321 [main] INFO org.springframework.boot.test.context.SpringBootTestContextBootstrapper -- Found @SpringBootConfiguration com.Capstone.InterviewTracking.InterviewTrackingApplication for test class com.Capstone.InterviewTracking.InterviewTrackingApplicationTests

2026-04-30T00:45:27.265+05:30 INFO 20344 --- [InterviewTracking] [ main] c.C.I.InterviewTrackingApplicationTests : Started InterviewTrackingApplicationTests in 8.846 seconds (process running for 10.978) 2026-04-30T00:45:27.265+05:30 DEBUG 20344 --- [InterviewTracking] [ main] o.s.b.a.ApplicationAvailabilityBean : Application availability state LivenessState changed to CORRECT 2026-04-30T00:45:27.282+05:30 DEBUG 20344 --- [InterviewTracking] [ main] o.s.b.a.ApplicationAvailabilityBean : Application availability state ReadinessState changed to ACCEPTING_TRAFFIC
testcase.system-err: Mockito is currently self-attaching to enable the inline-mock-maker. This will no longer work in future releases of the JDK. Please add Mockito as an agent to your build as described in Mockito's documentation: https://javadoc.io/doc/org.mockito/mockito-core/latest/org.mockito/org/mockito/Mockito.html#0.3 WARNING: A Java agent has been loaded dynamically (C:\Users\exami\Desktop\Assignment\Capstone_InterviewTracking\backend\InterviewTracking\.maven-tools\repository\net\bytebuddy\byte-buddy-agent\1.17.8\byte-buddy-agent-1.17.8.jar) WARNING: If a serviceability tool is in use, please run with -XX:+EnableDynamicAgentLoading to hide this warning WARNING: If a serviceability tool is not in use, please run with -Djdk.instrument.traceUsage for more information WARNING: Dynamic loading of agents will be disallowed by default in a future release
